programme.title: The Situation Room
programme.desc: Wolf Blitzer is in the command center for breaking news, politics and extraordinary reports from around the world.

programme.title: Erin Burnett OutFront
programme.desc: Erin Burnett stays ahead of the headlines, delivering a show that's in-depth and informative.

programme.title: Anderson Cooper 360
programme.desc: Anderson Cooper goes beyond the headlines to tell stories from many points of view, so you can make up your own mind about the news.

programme.title: Cuomo Prime Time
programme.desc: Chris Cuomo gets after it with newsmakers in Washington and around the world.

programme.title: Don Lemon Tonight
programme.desc: Don Lemon brings you the biggest stories, newsmakers and spirited conversations of the day.

programme.desc: Live from Atlanta, John Vause brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

programme.desc: A comprehensive review of sports news from around the world, including all the key highlights, profiles and interviews with the newsmakers and stars of sport.

programme.title: Inside Politics
programme.desc: An insider's look into the key stories of the week from John King and a group of America's top political reporters.

programme.title: Inside Africa
programme.desc: A surge of creative energy is flowing through Rwanda where filmmakers, visual artists, entertainers and more - are rewriting the narrative and helping to shape countries future.

programme.title: Amanpour
programme.desc: Christiane Amanpour provides her powerful interview skills and provocative analysis on global stories that matter to you.

programme.title: Hala Gorani Tonight
programme.desc: Hala Gorani breaks down the day's news, curating the stories that matter and getting into exactly why they are important.

programme.title: Quest Means Business
programme.desc: Richard Quest presides over a cast of experts and correspondents to deliver unrivaled facts, figures and analysis from the business world, a nightly wealth check.

programme.title: The Lead with Jake Tapper
programme.desc: Jake Tapper covers all the day's top stories around the country and the globe, from politics to money, sports to popular culture.

programme.title: Marketplace Africa
programme.desc: A look at the contemporary African art market; given the wide range of applications, satellites are part of the solution when it comes to solving the connectivity gap in Africa.

programme.title: Inside Africa
programme.desc: From superbikes to racecars, some of South Africa's fastest men and women on wheels provide an inside look at what life is like on, and off, the track.

programme.title: Africa Avant Garde
programme.desc: We hear from some of the continent's most experimental contemporary artists, including acclaimed Nigerian visual artist Victor Ehikhamenor.

programme.title: Connecting Africa
programme.desc: From the CEO of a massive energy company in South Africa and fruit exporters in Egypt to the man who bought a bank in Nigeria, we look at all aspects of doing business in Africa.

programme.title: CNN Newsroom with Michael Holmes
programme.desc: Live from Atlanta, Michael Holmes brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

programme.title: Marketplace Africa
programme.desc: Kenya's apparel sector localizes its supply chain and the role of Kenya-based textile manufacturers; African designers looking for success internationally face unique hurdles.

programme.title: CNN Newsroom with Michael Holmes
programme.desc: Live from Atlanta, Michael Holmes brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

programme.title: African Voices Changemakers
programme.desc: A Kenyan producer is on a mission to make the superhero genre more inclusive; the visionary behind the South Africa's first superhero comic book series.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Stanley Tucci eats and drinks his way around Milan, enjoying an aperitivo, feels inspired to make pizzoccheri, and enjoys classic Milanese - veal chops and risotto.

programme.desc: Stanley Tucci explores his former home, Tuscany, with a wine bar crawl, celebrating the importance of the lowly loaf and samples dishes which use stale bread as the key ingredient.

programme.desc: Erin Burnett stays ahead of the headlines, delivering a show that's in-depth and informative.

programme.title: Anderson Cooper 360
programme.desc: Anderson Cooper goes beyond the headlines to tell stories from many points of view, so you can make up your own mind about the news.

programme.desc: Don Lemon brings you the biggest stories, newsmakers and spirited conversations of the day.

programme.desc: Live from Atlanta, John Vause brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

programme.desc: A comprehensive review of sports news from around the world, including all the key highlights, profiles and interviews with the newsmakers and stars of sport.

programme.desc: Live from Atlanta, John Vause brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

programme.desc: A comprehensive review of sports news from around the world, including all the key highlights, profiles and interviews with the newsmakers and stars of sport.

programme.desc: Live from Atlanta, Michael Holmes brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

programme.desc: Get a jump on the day's news with Christine Romans and Laura Jarrett.

programme.title: New Day

programme.title: World Sport
programme.desc: A comprehensive review of sports news from around the world, including all the key highlights, profiles and interviews with the newsmakers and stars of sport.

programme.title: First Move with Julia Chatterley
programme.desc: Get a head start on what's moving the business agenda with Julia Chatterley live from the floor of the New York Stock Exchange.

programme.title: Connect the World
programme.desc: Connect the World takes viewers on a sweeping journey across continents, beyond headlines and into the stories changing our world.

programme.title: World Sport
programme.desc: A comprehensive review of sports news from around the world, including all the key highlights, profiles and interviews with the newsmakers and stars of sport.

programme.title: Connect the World
programme.desc: Connect the World takes viewers on a sweeping journey across continents, beyond headlines and into the stories changing our world.

programme.title: One World with Zain Asher
programme.desc: One World with Zain Asher offers a fresh and inclusive take on the top stories from Africa, Europe and beyond, giving every continent an equal voice.

programme.title: Inside Africa
programme.desc: From superbikes to racecars, some of South Africa's fastest men and women on wheels provide an inside look at what life is like on, and off, the track.

programme.title: Amanpour
programme.desc: Christiane Amanpour provides her powerful interview skills and provocative analysis on global stories that matter to you.

programme.title: Hala Gorani Tonight
programme.desc: Hala Gorani breaks down the day's news, curating the stories that matter and getting into exactly why they are important.

programme.title: Quest Means Business
programme.desc: Richard Quest presides over a cast of experts and correspondents to deliver unrivaled facts, figures and analysis from the business world, a nightly wealth check.

programme.title: Africa Avant Garde
programme.desc: We hear from some of the continent's most experimental contemporary artists, including acclaimed Nigerian visual artist Victor Ehikhamenor.

programme.title: The Lead with Jake Tapper
programme.desc: Jake Tapper covers all the day's top stories around the country and the globe, from politics to money, sports to popular culture.

programme.title: The Situation Room
programme.desc: Wolf Blitzer is in the command center for breaking news, politics and extraordinary reports from around the world.

programme.title: Erin Burnett OutFront
programme.desc: Erin Burnett stays ahead of the headlines, delivering a show that's in-depth and informative.

programme.title: Anderson Cooper 360
programme.desc: Anderson Cooper goes beyond the headlines to tell stories from many points of view, so you can make up your own mind about the news.

programme.title: CNN Special Report
programme.desc: Bill Weir takes viewers to high tech farms, food labs, and chef's tables across America to find out how farmers, chefs, and fishermen have adapted in the modern world. Are these changes enough to save the planet? What is the future of food?

programme.title: Don Lemon Tonight
programme.desc: Don Lemon brings you the biggest stories, newsmakers and spirited conversations of the day.

programme.title: CNN Newsroom with Michael Holmes
programme.desc: Live from Atlanta, Michael Holmes brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

programme.title: Marketplace Africa
programme.desc: Nigerian companies bring healthcare systems online in an effort to improve health outcomes across the region; the CEO of Bakhresa Group talk about the company's history.

programme.title: Inside Africa
programme.desc: The powerful voices of the Cape Town Opera Company tell universal stories. Follow along as they build a new audience and educate the next generation about this classic art form.

programme.title: Living Golf
programme.desc: We preview the Olympic golf competition with a look at the history of golf in the Olympic Games. Plus, learn about Japan's unique golfing culture.

programme.title: Quest's World of Wonder
programme.desc: Perched on the rocky cliffs above a shimmering sea are medieval ramparts, nearly perfectly intact, protecting a gem inside. Explore the real heart and soul of Dubrovnik.

programme.title: CNN Newsroom with Michael Holmes
programme.desc: Live from Atlanta, Michael Holmes brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

programme.title: Marketplace Africa
programme.desc: A look at the contemporary African art market; given the wide range of applications, satellites are part of the solution when it comes to solving the connectivity gap in Africa.

programme.title: CNN Newsroom with Michael Holmes
programme.desc: Live from Atlanta, Michael Holmes brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

programme.title: African Voices Changemakers
programme.desc: Uplifting young girls in Ghana by teaching them to code and become leaders, and in Sierra Leone, efforts to develop early childhood education and mental health access.

programme.desc: Live from Atlanta, Robyn Curnow brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

programme.title: CNN Newsroom with Kim Brunhuber
programme.desc: Kim Brunhuber brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

programme.title: Marketplace Asia
programme.desc: While spectators will be barred from attending the Tokyo Olympic Games, billions across the world will be using technology to tune in. The Olympic Games are a space for innovation.

programme.title: CNN Marketplace Europe
programme.desc: Anna Stewart looks at companies developing boundary breaking technologies at the Goodwood Festival's Future Lab and speaks to Jean-Marc Nasr, head of Space Systems for Airbus.

programme.desc: The powerful voices of the Cape Town Opera Company tell universal stories. Follow along as they build a new audience and educate the next generation about this classic art form.

programme.desc: CNN's Don Lemon reviews the most popular TV theme songs in history with Gary Portnoy of Cheers, Christopher Knight from The Brady Bunch, Fran Drescher from The Nanny, and the composer of a multitude of black tv theme songs Kurt Farquhar.

programme.title: World Sport
programme.desc: A comprehensive review of sports news from around the world, including all the key highlights, profiles and interviews with the newsmakers and stars of sport.

programme.title: Connect the World
programme.desc: Connect the World takes viewers on a sweeping journey across continents, beyond headlines and into the stories changing our world.

programme.title: Inside Politics
programme.desc: With veteran Washington correspondent John King in the anchor chair, `Inside Politics' focuses on the top political stories of the day with a rotating round table of top sourced reporters from CNN and from other media outlets. The half-hour program gives viewers an inside look at the stories driving Washington, directly from reporters on the ground. Prior to its revival in 2014, `Inside Politics' was first headed by Judy Woodruff, and it aired for more than 20 years on CNN before its cancellation in 2005.

programme.title: Marketplace Africa
programme.desc: Nigerian companies bring healthcare systems online in an effort to improve health outcomes across the region; the CEO of Bakhresa Group talk about the company's history.

programme.title: Amanpour
programme.desc: Christiane Amanpour provides her powerful interview skills and provocative analysis on global stories that matter to you.

programme.title: Hala Gorani Tonight
programme.desc: Hala Gorani breaks down the day's news, curating the stories that matter and getting into exactly why they are important.

programme.title: Quest Means Business
programme.desc: Richard Quest presides over a cast of experts and correspondents to deliver unrivaled facts, figures and analysis from the business world, a nightly wealth check.

programme.title: Living Golf
programme.desc: We preview the Olympic golf competition with a look at the history of golf in the Olympic Games. Plus, learn about Japan's unique golfing culture.

programme.title: The Lead with Jake Tapper
programme.desc: Jake Tapper covers all the day's top stories around the country and the globe, from politics to money, sports to popular culture.

programme.title: The Lead with Jake Tapper
programme.desc: Jake Tapper covers all the day's top stories around the country and the globe, from politics to money, sports to popular culture.

programme.title: The Situation Room

programme.title: Anderson Cooper 360
programme.desc: Anderson Cooper goes beyond the headlines to tell stories from many points of view, so you can make up your own mind about the news.

programme.title: Cuomo Prime Time
programme.desc: Chris Cuomo gets after it with newsmakers in Washington and around the world.

programme.title: Don Lemon Tonight

programme.title: Early Start
programme.desc: Get a jump on the day's news with Christine Romans and Laura Jarrett.

programme.title: New Day
programme.desc: John Berman and Brianna Keilar report the latest news and top stories.

programme.title: World Sport
programme.desc: A comprehensive review of sports news from around the world, including all the key highlights, profiles and interviews with the newsmakers and stars of sport.

programme.title: First Move with Julia Chatterley
programme.desc: A look at the big stories developing as the US markets open, anchored from the floor of the NYSE.

programme.title: Connect the World
programme.desc: Taking the viewers on a journey across the continents.

programme.title: World Sport
programme.desc: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

programme.title: Connect the World
programme.desc: Taking the viewers on a journey across the continents.

programme.title: Inside Politics
programme.desc: With veteran Washington correspondent John King in the anchor chair, `Inside Politics' focuses on the top political stories of the day with a rotating round table of top sourced reporters from CNN and from other media outlets. The half-hour program gives viewers an inside look at the stories driving Washington, directly from reporters on the ground. Prior to its revival in 2014, `Inside Politics' was first headed by Judy Woodruff, and it aired for more than 20 years on CNN before its cancellation in 2005.

programme.title: African Voices Changemakers
programme.desc: An exploration of the changemakers in Africa who are coming up with innovative ways to have a positive impact on their communities.

programme.title: Amanpour
programme.desc: Peabody Award-winning journalist Christiane Amanpour, CNN's chief international correspondent, hosts this half-hour weeknight interview program, with each episode focusing on a newsworthy topic and featuring guests, from global leaders to heads of state and cultural icons, who are comfortable challenging conventional wisdom.

programme.title: Hala Gorani Tonight
programme.desc: Hala Gorani breaks down the day's news, curating the stories that matter and getting into exactly why they are important.

programme.title: Quest Means Business
programme.desc: Richard Quest and a team of correspondents analyze the facts and figures from the business world to help people earn money and spend it wisely.

programme.title: Living Golf
programme.desc: Previewing the Olympic golf competition with a look at the history of golf in the Olympic Games. Plus, a look at Japan's unique golfing culture.

programme.title: The Lead with Jake Tapper
programme.desc: CNN's chief Washington correspondent, Jake Tapper, hosts this hour-long weekday afternoon program, which covers all the day's top stories from around the country and the world, headlines that span politics, money, sports and popular culture. `The Lead' works to ensure that viewers are caught up on the stories that matter, often highlighting news that may have been overlooked. Prior to joining CNN, Tapper served as senior White House correspondent at ABC News.

programme.title: The Situation Room
programme.desc: Anchor Wolf Blitzer invites CNN correspondents, analysts and guests for timely coverage of the day's news events. Patterned after the concept of the White House Situation Room, the Monday-Saturday show is a discussion forum often with opposing sides debating current national affairs.

programme.title: Erin Burnett OutFront
programme.desc: It's Erin Burnett's turn to step out front and try to maintain a viable viewer presence for CNN in the weekday news arena. But the former CNBC anchor won't worry about ratings for her hourlong general news program, comparing that burden to "death." Instead, she'll concern herself with translating world events into relevant information for viewers, paying close attention to such topics as the Middle East and women's issues. "I want people to say that our show is smart. I want our show to be authentic", Burnett says in a promo. "I want our show to have courage". Left unsaid, of course, is that she wants her show to have a big audience, too.

programme.title: Anderson Cooper 360
programme.desc: Cooper brings his prickly but often witty perspective to current events and personalities in the news. He is joined by a series of guests that frequently include political and legal analysts.

programme.title: Cuomo Prime Time
programme.desc: After airing several different programs in this time slot in recent years, CNN attempts to solidify its prime-time schedule by moving Chris Cuomo to the toughest hour in cable news. Cuomo, the former co-anchor of CNN's morning show `New Day', eschews panel discussions in favour of in-depth one-on-one interviews that test politicians and newsmakers on their positions. He also analyses the news of the day and presents breaking news. Described by one publication as "America's toughest news anchor", Cuomo wants his show to be known as one that holds civil debates. "The need is clear", he says. "Hopefully we help fill it".

programme.title: Don Lemon Tonight
programme.desc: Don Lemon presents the biggest stories, newsmakers, and spirited conversations of the day.

programme.title: CNN Newsroom with John Vause
programme.desc: Live from Atlanta, John Vause brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world, followed by the latest sporting news.

programme.title: World Sport
programme.desc: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

programme.title: CNN Newsroom with John Vause
programme.desc: Live from Atlanta, John Vause brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world, followed by the latest sporting news.

programme.title: World Sport
programme.desc: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

programme.title: CNN Newsroom with Rosemary Church
programme.desc: Live from Atlanta, Rosemary Church brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

programme.title: Early Start
programme.desc: An early start with news from Ashleigh Banfield and Zoraida Sambolin.

programme.desc: Stanley Tucci visits Sicily. Here, Stanley tries a salty and crunchy sensation, tastes the grapes grown in the region's unique soils, and reflects on the nature of Sicilian hospitality.

programme.desc: A look at the big stories developing as the US markets open, anchored from the floor of the NYSE.

programme.desc: CNN's chief Washington correspondent, Jake Tapper, hosts this hour-long weekday afternoon program, which covers all the day's top stories from around the country and the world, headlines that span politics, money, sports and popular culture. `The Lead' works to ensure that viewers are caught up on the stories that matter, often highlighting news that may have been overlooked. Prior to joining CNN, Tapper served as senior White House correspondent at ABC News.

programme.title: The Situation Room
programme.desc: Anchor Wolf Blitzer invites CNN correspondents, analysts and guests for timely coverage of the day's news events. Patterned after the concept of the White House Situation Room, the Monday-Saturday show is a discussion forum often with opposing sides debating current national affairs.

programme.title: Erin Burnett OutFront
programme.desc: It's Erin Burnett's turn to step out front and try to maintain a viable viewer presence for CNN in the weekday news arena. But the former CNBC anchor won't worry about ratings for her hourlong general news program, comparing that burden to "death." Instead, she'll concern herself with translating world events into relevant information for viewers, paying close attention to such topics as the Middle East and women's issues. "I want people to say that our show is smart. I want our show to be authentic", Burnett says in a promo. "I want our show to have courage". Left unsaid, of course, is that she wants her show to have a big audience, too.

programme.title: Anderson Cooper 360
programme.desc: Cooper brings his prickly but often witty perspective to current events and personalities in the news. He is joined by a series of guests that frequently include political and legal analysts.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Stanley Tucci visits Sicily. Here, Stanley tries a salty and crunchy sensation, tastes the grapes grown in the region's unique soils, and reflects on the nature of Sicilian hospitality.

programme.title: Don Lemon Tonight
programme.desc: Don Lemon presents the biggest stories, newsmakers, and spirited conversations of the day.

programme.title: CNN Newsroom with John Vause
programme.desc: Live from Atlanta, John Vause brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world, followed by the latest sporting news.

programme.title: World Sport
programme.desc: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

programme.desc: Live from Atlanta, Rosemary Church brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

programme.title: Early Start
programme.desc: An early start with news from Ashleigh Banfield and Zoraida Sambolin.

programme.desc: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

programme.title: First Move with Julia Chatterley
programme.desc: A look at the big stories developing as the US markets open, anchored from the floor of the NYSE.

programme.desc: Taking the viewers on a journey across the continents.
